name: Italian Meatballs in a Basket
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly shape ground beef into 1 1/2-inch balls.
2. Lightly brown balls in margarine in a large frying pan, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the green pepper and onion to meatballs; cook 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Drain tomatoes, reserving liquid.
5. Add tomatoes, all but 1/4 cup tomato liquid, basil, and thyme to meat balls. Cover tightly and cook slowly for 5 minutes.
6. Combine reserved tomato liquid with flour, stirring until smooth. Stir into meatballs; cover tightly and cook for another 5 minutes or until slightly thick.
7. Prepare Italian Bread Basket and place on a platter. Spoon the meatball mixture into and around the bread.
8. Garnish with green pepper rings and cherry tomatoes, if desired.
Italian Bread Basket:
1. 1 Loaf (16 ozs) Italian Bread, Unsliced
2. 1/4 Cup Margarine, Melted
3. 1/4 Cup Parmesan Cheese, Grated
Cut a 3/4 slice from the top of the bread. With a fork, scoop out the inside of the bread to form a basket, leaving a 1-inch layer of bread on all sides and bottom of the loaf.
Place the loaf on foil in a shallow baking pan. Brush the top, sides, and inside of the bread with melted margarine. Sprinkle the bread evenly with Parmesan cheese.
Bake in a hot oven (400 Degrees F.) for 10 minutes.
